A

AddressMatcher - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.util
Generic utility for grouping address records into lookup maps keyed by normalized address.
AddressMatcher() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.util.AddressMatcher
 
AddressMatchResult - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.model
Captures the outcome of attempting to match a single address across systems.
AddressMatchResult() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Constructs an empty result.
AddressNormalizer - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.util
Normalizes raw address strings and builds composite comparison keys.
AddressNormalizer() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.util.AddressNormalizer
 
AddressPipelineProperties - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.config
Typed configuration properties for the address pipeline.
AddressPipelineProperties() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
 
AddressPipelineProperties.Header - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.config
Maps logical field names to the physical column header labels used in the sheet.
AddressPipelineRunner - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.service
Startup hook that triggers the address pipeline and shuts down the application cleanly.
AddressPipelineRunner(AddressPipelineService, AddressPipelineProperties, ApplicationContext) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressPipelineRunner
Constructs the runner with its required dependencies.
AddressPipelineService - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.service
Orchestrates the full address pipeline that runs at application startup.
AddressPipelineService(SalesforceClient, GoogleSheetsClient, BuildiumClient, AddressNormalizer, AddressQualityService, AddressPipelineProperties) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressPipelineService
Constructs the pipeline service with all required integration clients and helpers.
AddressQualityService - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.service
Classifies the data quality of a Salesforce address record before it enters the matching phase.
AddressQualityService() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressQualityService
 
AddressQualityService.Quality - Enum Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.service
Three-tier quality classification for Salesforce address records.
AddressRecord - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.model
Base representation of an address record shared across integration systems.
AddressRecord() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressRecord
Constructs an empty record.
AddressRecord(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressRecord
Constructs a fully populated record.
AddressSyncController - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller
REST controller for triggering the address sync pipeline on demand.
AddressSyncController(AddressSyncService) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller.AddressSyncController
Constructs the controller with its required service dependency.
AddressSyncRequest - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto
Request body for the address sync REST endpoint.
AddressSyncRequest() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
 
AddressSyncService - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.service
API-triggered address synchronization service.
AddressSyncService(SalesforceClient, GoogleSheetsClient, BuildiumClient, AuditLogService, AddressNormalizer, AddressMatcher) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressSyncService
Constructs the sync service with all required integration clients and helpers.
AddressSyncSummary - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto
Summary of the results returned after a sync run completes.
AddressSyncSummary() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
 
ApiResponse<T> - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto
Generic wrapper for successful API responses.
ApiResponse() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Constructs an empty response (for deserialization).
ApiResponse(String, T) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Constructs a response with the given status and payload, setting the timestamp to now.
AuditLogService - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit
Structured logging service for address pipeline workflow events.
AuditLogService() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
 
AuditService - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit
Centralized compliance-oriented audit event logging.

batchUpdateAddressMatches(String, String, List<SheetBatchUpdateRequest>) - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.GoogleSheetsClient
Writes matched Salesforce and Buildium IDs back into the sheet using the Sheets API batch update endpoint.
batchUpdateAddressMatches(String, String, List<SheetBatchUpdateRequest>) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.GoogleSheetsClientImpl
 
BuildiumAddressRecord - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.model
Represents a single address record fetched from Buildium.
BuildiumAddressRecord() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Constructs an empty record.
BuildiumClient - Interface in com.berryrock.integrationhub.client
Contract for all interactions with the Buildium property management API.
BuildiumClientImpl - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.client
REST client implementation for the Buildium property management API.
BuildiumClientImpl(WebClient, BuildiumProperties) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClientImpl
Constructs the client with the Buildium-specific web client and configuration properties.
BuildiumProperties - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.config
Typed configuration properties for the Buildium integration.
BuildiumProperties() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
 
buildiumWebClient(WebClient.Builder, BuildiumProperties) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.HttpClientConfig
Creates the pre-configured WebClient for all calls to the Buildium API.
buildNormalizedKey(String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.util.AddressNormalizer
Builds a pipe-delimited composite key from the four address components.

C

checkAll() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.IntegrationHealthService
Probes all configured integration endpoints and returns their status.
classify(SalesforceAddressRecord) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressQualityService
Classifies the quality of the address carried by the given Salesforce record.
CLEAN - Enum constant in enum class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressQualityService.Quality
All four address components are present and the street line does not appear to contain data from other fields.

E

ErrorResponse - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto
Structured error response returned by the API when a request fails.
ErrorResponse() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Constructs an empty error response (for deserialization).
ErrorResponse(String, String, List<String>) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Constructs a fully populated error response, setting status = "ERROR" and the timestamp to now.

F

fetchActiveLeaseAddresses() - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClient
Fetches all active-lease address records by joining the units and leases endpoints.
fetchActiveLeaseAddresses() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClientImpl
 
fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync() - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.SalesforceClient
Fetches all Salesforce Opportunity records that have a non-null street address, intended for use in the Google Sheet / Buildium address sync pipeline.
fetchAddressesForGoogleSheetBuildiumSync() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.SalesforceClientImpl

Reads all data rows from the specified sheet and maps them to typed row objects.
fetchAddressRows(String, String) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.GoogleSheetsClientImpl

getAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the address column.
getAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the raw address string from the sheet.
getAddressLine() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the street address line from Salesforce.
getAllRentals() - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClient
Fetches all rental properties by repeatedly calling BuildiumClient.getRentalsPage(int, int) until the API returns a partial page.
getAllRentals() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClientImpl
 
getBaseUrl() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns the base URL for the Buildium API.
getBatchSize() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
Returns the optional batch size limit.
getBuildiumId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the Buildium ID column.
getBuildiumId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the Buildium property ID stored in this row.
getBuildiumId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest
Returns the Buildium property ID to write into the Buildium ID column.
getBuildiumLeaseId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the Buildium lease ID column.
getBuildiumLeaseId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the Buildium lease ID of the active lease linked to this unit.
getBuildiumLeaseId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the Buildium lease ID stored in this row.
getBuildiumLeaseId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest
Returns the Buildium lease ID to write.
getBuildiumMatches() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the number of sheet rows also matched to a Buildium record.
getBuildiumPropertyId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the Buildium property ID column.
getBuildiumPropertyId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns the Buildium property ID of the matched unit.
getBuildiumPropertyId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the Buildium property ID for the parent property.
getBuildiumPropertyId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the Buildium property ID (same value as GoogleSheetAddressRow.getBuildiumId() in the current pipeline; kept as a separate column for sheet compatibility).
getBuildiumPropertyId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest
Returns the Buildium property ID to write into the Buildium Property ID column.
getBuildiumRecordsFetched() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the number of Buildium active-lease records fetched.
getBuildiumUnitId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the Buildium unit ID.
getCity() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the city column.
getCity() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the city component of the unit's address.
getCity() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the city component from the sheet.
getCity() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the city component of the address.
getClientId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns the Buildium API client ID.
getClientSecret() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns the Buildium API client secret.
getCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Returns the machine-readable error code.
getConnectTimeoutSeconds() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns the TCP connection timeout in seconds.
getCountryCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the country code component of the address.
getCsvPath() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
Returns the local CSV path used in place of the live Google Sheet.
getData() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Returns the response payload.
getDetails() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Returns the list of detail messages.
getGoogleSheetMatches() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the number of Salesforce records matched to sheet rows.
getGoogleSheetRowsFetched() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the number of Loan Tape rows read from Google Sheets (or CSV).
getHeader() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns the column header label mappings.
getHeaderRow() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns the 1-based index of the header row.
getId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressRecord
Returns the system-specific identifier for this record.
getMatchSource() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns a description of which systems and which matching pass produced this result.
getMessage() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Returns the human-readable error description.
getNormalizedAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressRecord
Returns the normalized address string produced by the pipeline.
getNormalizedAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the normalized composite key used for address matching.
getNormalizedAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the normalized composite key used internally for matching.
getNormalizedAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the normalized composite key used for address matching.
getNormalizedKey() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns the normalized composite key used during matching.
getOpportunityId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the Salesforce Opportunity ID.
getPageSize() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns the configured page size for Buildium API pagination.
getPostalCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header
Returns the header label for the ZIP/postal code column.
getPostalCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
Returns the postal code component of the unit's address.
getPostalCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the postal code from the sheet.
getPostalCode() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the postal code component of the address.
getQuality() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the quality classification for this record's address.
getRawAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressRecord
Returns the address string exactly as received from the source system.

Returns the raw street address as received from Buildium.
getRawAddress() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the composite raw address string.

Returns the read timeout in seconds.

Returns the 1-based row number within the spreadsheet.

Returns the header label for the SF address quality column.

Returns the quality label assigned by the pipeline.

Returns the header label for the SF address sync status column.

Returns the header label for the SF standardized address column.

Returns the Salesforce-standardized address to write.
getSheetId() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns the Google Sheets spreadsheet ID.

Returns the spreadsheet ID override.
getSheetName() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns the sheet tab name.
getSheetName() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
Returns the sheet tab name override.
getSheetRowNumber() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns the 1-based row number in the Google Sheet that was matched.
getSourceSystem() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the name of the source system that produced this record.

Returns the header label for the state column.

Returns the state component of the unit's address.
getState() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
Returns the state component from the sheet.
getState() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Returns the state code component of the address.
getStatus() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the overall status string.
getStatus() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Returns the status label for this response.
getStatus() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Returns the status label.
getTimestamp() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Returns the server-side timestamp at which this response was created.
getTimestamp() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
Returns the server-side creation timestamp.
getUnmatchedCount() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the number of Salesforce records for which no sheet row was found.
getWarning() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns any warning associated with this result (e.g., ambiguous Buildium match).
getWarnings() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncSummary
Returns the list of warnings generated during the run.

Centralized exception handler for all REST controllers in this service.

Represents one data row from the Loan Tape Google Sheet.

Groups a list of records into a map keyed by each record's normalized address string.

handleAllUncaughtException(Exception) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller.GlobalExceptionHandler
Catch-all handler for any exception not handled by a more specific method.

Handles explicit bad-input rejections thrown by service code.

Handles Spring Bean Validation failures (@Valid on request bodies).

Returns whether the Salesforce integration is configured and enabled.

isDryRun() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns whether dry-run mode is active.

Returns whether dry-run mode is active.
isEnabled() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
Returns whether the pipeline is enabled.
isEnabled() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.BuildiumProperties
Returns whether the Buildium integration is enabled.
isEnrichBuildium() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
Returns whether Buildium records should be fetched and used during matching.
isMatched() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.AddressMatchResult
Returns whether a match was found.
isSyncGoogleSheet() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
Returns whether matched results should be written back to Google Sheets.

L

logBuildiumFetchCompleted(int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs completion of the Buildium active-lease address fetch phase.
logBuildiumMatchComplete(int, int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs completion of the Buildium address matching phase.
logEvent(String, String, String) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditService
Records a structured audit event.
logGoogleSheetFetchCompleted(int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs completion of the Google Sheet (Loan Tape) fetch phase.
logGoogleSheetWrite(boolean, int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs the result of the Google Sheet write-back step.
logSalesforceFetchCompleted(int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs completion of the Salesforce Opportunity fetch phase.
logSalesforceToGoogleSheetMatchesComplete(int, int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs completion of the Salesforce-to-sheet address matching phase.
logWorkflowCompleted(long, int) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs successful completion of the entire pipeline workflow.
logWorkflowFailed(String, Throwable) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs a fatal workflow failure.
logWorkflowStarted(boolean) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.audit.AuditLogService
Logs the start of a pipeline workflow run.

M

Bootstraps the Spring application context and starts the embedded server.

N

normalize(String) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.util.AddressNormalizer
Normalizes a single address component string.

P

PARTIAL - Enum constant in enum class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressQualityService.Quality
The street address is present but at least one of city, state, or postal code is missing.
ping() - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClient
Performs a lightweight connectivity check against the Buildium API.
ping() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.BuildiumClientImpl
 
ping() - Method in interface com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.GoogleSheetsClient
Performs a lightweight connectivity check against the Google Sheets API.
ping() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.GoogleSheetsClientImpl
 
ping() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller.SystemController
Simple liveness check endpoint.
pingClients() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.SystemIntegrationService
Pings all configured integration clients and returns their connectivity status.

R

run(AddressSyncRequest) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller.AddressSyncController
Triggers a full address sync pipeline run.
run(AddressSyncRequest) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressSyncService
Delegates to AddressSyncService.runSync(AddressSyncRequest).
run(String...) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressPipelineRunner
Called by Spring Boot immediately after context initialization.
runPipeline() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressPipelineService
Executes the full address matching and write-back pipeline.
runSync(AddressSyncRequest) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressSyncService
Executes the full sync workflow for the given request configuration.

S

SalesforceAddressRecord - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.model
Represents a single Salesforce Opportunity record as fetched by the address pipeline.
SalesforceAddressRecord() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
Constructs an empty record.
SalesforceClient - Interface in com.berryrock.integrationhub.client
Contract for all interactions with the Salesforce REST API.
SalesforceClientImpl - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.client
Salesforce REST API client that authenticates via the OAuth 2.0 JWT bearer token flow.
SalesforceClientImpl() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.client.SalesforceClientImpl
Constructs the client with a default RestTemplate.
setAddress(String) - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties.Header

SheetBatchUpdateRequest - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.model
Describes the cell values to write back into a single Google Sheet row.
SheetBatchUpdateRequest() - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SheetBatchUpdateRequest
Constructs an empty request.
success(T) - Static method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ApiResponse
Factory method that creates a "SUCCESS" response wrapping the given payload.
SUSPICIOUS - Enum constant in enum class com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressQualityService.Quality
The street address line appears to contain city, state, or ZIP data, indicating a data entry problem.
SystemController - Class in com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller
REST controller for application-level system endpoints.
SystemController(SystemIntegrationService) - Constructor for class com.berryrock.integrationhub.controller.SystemController
Constructs the controller with its required service dependency.

Service providing system-level operations used by the general-purpose REST endpoints.

Constructs the service with all required integration client and audit dependencies.

W

webClientBuilder() - Method in class com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.HttpClientConfig
Provides a shared WebClient.Builder that other beans can use as a starting point when they need to create their own configured client instance.
